title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.922 - Certain annexations effective on date determined by jurisdictions involved
text:
71.922.  Certain annexations effective on date determined by jurisdictions involved. — Any annexation initiated by a municipality through first reading of an ordinance and by the holding of a public hearing on or before June 12, 1995, in any county with a charter form of government where fifty or more cities, towns and villages have been incorporated shall become effective on the date determined by the jurisdictions involved in such annexation.
(L. 1995 H.B. 446 § 1) 
Effective 6-02-95
